---
type: concept
created: 2026-06-15
updated: 2026-06-15
sources:
  - "[itu-t-l-1501-adaptation-best-practices](../sources/itu-t-l-1501-adaptation-best-practices.qmd)"
  - "[ITU-T L.1500 (Adaptation Framework)](../sources/ITU-T L.1500 (Adaptation Framework).qmd)"
tags:
  - "theory"
aliases:
  - "Adaptation to climate change"
  - "Climate adaptation"
---

## Related Concepts
- [Greening-by-Digital](greening-by-digital.qmd)
- [Climate Action](climate-action.qmd)
- [Climate Change](climate-change.qmd)

## Related Entities
- [Cancun Adaptation Framework](../entities/cancun-adaptation-framework.qmd)
- [IPCC](../entities/ipcc.qmd)
- [UNFCCC](../entities/unfccc.qmd)

## Mentions in Source
> **Source: [ITU-T L.1501 (Adaptation Best Practices)](../sources/itu-t-l-1501-adaptation-best-practices.qmd)**
> - "Adaptation to climate change can be defined as the adjustment in ecological, social or economic systems in response to actual or expected climatic stimuli and their effects."

> **Source: [ITU-T L.1500 (Adaptation Framework)](../sources/itu-t-l-1500-adaptation-framework.qmd)**
> - "Adaptation to climate change can be defined as the adjustment in ecological, social or economic systems in response to actual or expected climatic stimuli and their effects."
> - "It refers to changes in processes, practices and structures to moderate potential harm or benefit from opportunities associated with climate change."
